word: H4125 - מֹואָבִי - Môwʼâbîy - mo-aw-bee' - Of Moab

sections.paragraph:
Original: מואבית מואביּה מואבי

Transliteration: mô'âbı̂y mô'âbı̂yâh mô'âbı̂yth

Phonetic: mo-aw-bee'

BDB Definition:

Moabite = "from father: what father?"
  1. an citizen of Moab
  2. an inhabitant of the land of Moab

Origin: patronymical from H4124

TWOT entry: 1155a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
